items.title: ‘What could have been’ – Liverpool fans emotional over video of Kylian Mbappe with Jurgen Klopp after failed transfer
items.summary: FORMER Liverpool chief Jurgen Klopp has left fans shellshocked - after being spotted celebrating with ex-Anfield transfer target Kylian Mbappe. The French superstar, 27, spearheaded his country into the World Cup semi-finals with a stunning opener in a 2-0 win over Morocco last night. Videos showed

items.title: Belgium take strength from ‘millions and millions’ of new fans before Spain clash
items.summary: Rudi Garcia says his team can benefit from Balogun red card saga ‘Everyone is talking about us going home but we can do it,’ coach says Rudi Garcia has claimed that Belgium have got “millions and millions” of new supporters after Donald Trump lobbied Fifa to overturn Folarin Balogun’s red card ahead
